name: Programming Language Policy as an AI Literacy Equity Problem: A 15-Nation Comparative Analysis
summary: arXiv:2607.11314v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The promise of AI literacy ``for all'' confronts a structural challenge embedded in how nations organise secondary computer science education. In m...
description: arXiv:2607.11314v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The promise of AI literacy ``for all'' confronts a structural challenge embedded in how nations organise secondary computer science education. In most systems, a general-track subject -- Digital Literacy, ICT, TIC, or SNT -- bears the weight of universal AI literacy, while a specialist Informatics course serves STEM pathways separately. Yet the...
author: Adrian-Marius Dumitran, Iulia-Maria Popescu
